title: Cobblemon Pink Pastel GUI
description: A Cobblemon resource pack that redesigns the PC, Summary, and Party Overlay with a sleek Pink Pastel aesthetic for a modern and cohesive UI.
body:
![PC](https://i.imgur.com/t9el5r4.png)

This Cobblemon resource pack completely refreshes the visual experience by redesigning three of the most frequently used interface elements: the PC, Summary screen, and Party Overlay. It introduces a Pink Pastel color palette, blending deep tones with pink accents to create a clean, modern, and visually appealing style.
